subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the Most Exalted Pen inscribeth at an hour when it weepeth and lamenteth in the secret places of its lines by reason of that which hath befallen it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب یکتبه قلم الاعلی حین الذی یبکی و ینوح فی سر السطر بما ورد علیه من
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
